situation: MCP packages (uvx) not working properly - UV_INDEX_URL env var configuration inconsistent
root_cause: UV_INDEX_URL defined in multiple places: Dockerfile, container-runner.ts, and .mcp.json with different values
solution: 1) Removed UV_INDEX_URL from container-runner.ts 2) Added UV_INDEX_URL to .mcp.json env section 3) Used uv instead of uvx symlink in Dockerfile
lesson: Related environment variables should be configured in ONE place to avoid inconsistency
